headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Delta Air Lines (DAL) After Its Strong 1 Year Rally?
summary: Wondering if Delta Air Lines at about US$64.83 is offering good value or if the easy gains are behind it? This article walks through what the current price might be baking in. Recent returns are mixed, with the stock up 2.2% over the last 7 days, showing a 6.6% decline over 30 days and a 6.1% decline year to date, while the 1 year and 3 year returns sit at 49.7% and 91.3% respectively. The share price context is shaped by ongoing sector wide interest in airlines and investor focus on...

headline: Americans just endured a nightmare week of travel. It's not going to get better anytime soon.
summary:
QUEENS, N.Y. - At John F. Kennedy International Airport in New York City, travellers queued at TSA checkpoints, anxious to get to their gates before their flights took off. 

 At terminal 4, which serves mostly Delta and some international carriers, the lines for TSA Pre-check, digital ID, and Clear - the private screening company - were less than 5 minutes; however general TSA lines appeared to be around 30 minutes.

"We left 4 hours earlier than we originally planned," said Mike Mayer, an aviation and defense exec based in New York, said after he got through security in Terminal 4. 

But right next door at Terminal 5 which serves budget airline JetBlue, wait times for general boarding appeared to last for hours.
